name: Dowel Leg Coffee Table - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring rustic charm to your home with this Woven Coffee Table from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This light brown coffee table features a smooth tabletop and a woven bottom shelf that adds texture and extra storage space. The rectangular silhouette with dowel legs creates an inviting look that works well in your living room or den.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Overall Width: 45.6 inches
Overall Height: 16.5 inches
Overall Depth: 22 inches
Distance between front legs: 41.7 inches
Distance between front leg and back leg: 18.1 inches
Distance between shelf to bottom of table top : 7.6 inches
